stemHtml: Which statement accurately characterizes pneumatic anti-icing / de-icing systems on aircraft?

options.a: Anti-icing liquid is drawn through a porous surface by suction.
options.b: Heated air is directed onto or through the component to be de-iced.
options.c: The system increases engine thrust during climb.
options.d: Ice is removed solely by aerodynamic airflow over the surface.
